security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1:* ws://localhost:* ws://127.0.0.1:*; img-src 'self' data:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; form-action 'self'
